testcase.name: test_pdf_with_very_long_description

failure.message: AssertionError: PDF generation failed for long description: 520 assert 520 == 200 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_pdf_facturation.py:206: in test_pdf_with_very_long_description assert pdf_response.status_code == 200, f"PDF generation failed for long description: {pdf_response.status_code}" E AssertionError: PDF generation failed for long description: 520 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_pdf_calculation_qty_times_pu_ht

failure.message: AssertionError: Subtotal mismatch: 690.0 vs 660.0 assert 30.0 < 0.01 + where 30.0 = abs((690.0 - 660.0))

testcase.failure: tests/test_pdf_facturation.py:261: in test_pdf_calculation_qty_times_pu_ht assert abs(invoice["subtotal"] - expected_subtotal) < 0.01, f"Subtotal mismatch: {invoice['subtotal']} vs {expected_subtotal}" E AssertionError: Subtotal mismatch: 690.0 vs 660.0 E assert 30.0 < 0.01 E + where 30.0 = abs((690.0 - 660.0))
